ForkParentUnchangedState.description: State model derived from ForkParentUnchanged TLA+ spec

ParentMergedFrozen.description: Verifier for invariant ParentMergedFrozen from ForkParentUnchanged spec

NoParentWrites.description: Verifier for invariant NoParentWrites from ForkParentUnchanged spec

NewSessionIsolated.description: Verifier for invariant NewSessionIsolated from ForkParentUnchanged spec

ParentLengthPreserved.description: Verifier for invariant ParentLengthPreserved from ForkParentUnchanged spec

ReplayTargetsNewSession.description: Verifier for invariant ReplayTargetsNewSession from ForkParentUnchanged spec

AllInvariants.message:
AllInvariants violation: /\ ParentMergedFrozen
  /\ NoParentWrites
  /\ NewSessionIsolated
  /\ ParentLengthPreserved
  /\ ReplayTargetsNewSes...
AllInvariants.description: Verifier for invariant AllInvariants from ForkParentUnchanged spec

assert_ParentMergedFrozen.message:
Assertion failed: ParentMergedFrozen — phase \in {"ForkDispatched", "SessionCreated", "Replaying", "NavigatedToNew"}
  => parentMerged = preForkSnapshot
assert_ParentMergedFrozen.description: Test assertion for ParentMergedFrozen from ForkParentUnchanged spec

assert_NoParentWrites.message: Assertion failed: NoParentWrites — \A i \in 1..Len(writesLog) : writesLog[i].sid # P
assert_NoParentWrites.description: Test assertion for NoParentWrites from ForkParentUnchanged spec

assert_NewSessionIsolated.message: Assertion failed: NewSessionIsolated — \A i \in 1..Len(writesLog) : writesLog[i].sid = NEW_ID
assert_NewSessionIsolated.description: Test assertion for NewSessionIsolated from ForkParentUnchanged spec

assert_ParentLengthPreserved.description: Test assertion for ParentLengthPreserved from ForkParentUnchanged spec

assert_ReplayTargetsNewSession.description: Test assertion for ReplayTargetsNewSession from ForkParentUnchanged spec

assert_AllInvariants.condition:
and ParentMergedFrozen
  and NoParentWrites
  and NewSessionIsolated
  and ParentLengthPreserved
  and ReplayTargetsNewSession
assert_AllInvariants.message:
Assertion failed: AllInvariants — /\ ParentMergedFrozen
  /\ NoParentWrites
  /\ NewSessionIsolated
  /\ ParentLengthPreserved
  /\ ReplayTargetsNewSes...
assert_AllInvariants.description: Test assertion for AllInvariants from ForkParentUnchanged spec
